Configuration.name: IODIR
Configuration.description: I/O DIRECTION REGISTER. Controls the direction of the data I/O. When a bit is set, the corresponding pin becomes an input. When a bit is clear, the corresponding pin becomes an output.

fields.name: IODIR
fields.description: I/O direction bits

fields.name: IP0

fields.name: Reserved
fields.description: Unimplemented bit, read as ‘0’

fields.name: BANK
fields.description: Controls how the registers are addressed. 1 = The registers associated with each port are separated into different banks. 0 = The registers are in the same bank (addresses are sequential).

fields.name: MIRROR
fields.description: INT Pins Mirror bit. 1 = The INT pins are internally connected
